executive_summary: Matcha green and celebrity nail moments are dominating beauty signals. Fashion-meets-motorsport crossover and viral fragrance scarcity are driving immediate purchase intent.

top_trends.what_is_it: Taylor Swift spotted with matcha green bag, triggering mass dupe-hunting across platforms.
top_trends.why_it_matters: Celebrity co-sign plus affordable dupe angle equals instant viral purchase loop.
top_trends.content_angle: Show your matcha green product next to a matcha latte. Obvious. Do it.

post_now: Reel: Style your green product with matcha drink, caption 'Taylor approved.'
Carousel: 5 ways to wear matcha green this spring, tag Nordstrom Rack.
tactics.ugc_brief: Creators: film a 'matcha everything' haul featuring our green product front and center.
tactics.asset_creation: Flat lay: green product, matcha cup, spring florals, warm natural light.
tactics.seeding: Send product to mid-tier fashion creators already posting Swift style content.
caption_hooks: She carried it so we could wear it.
Matcha green is the new neutral and Taylor knows it.
The $37 energy with the main character attitude.

top_trends.what_is_it: Selena Gomez's exact red nail polish ID'd and going viral as a must-cop shade.
top_trends.why_it_matters: Celebrity nail IDs drive immediate product sell-outs and massive organic search traffic.
top_trends.content_angle: Recreate Selena's exact red nail look using your product. Be first.

post_now: Reel: 'We found Selena's red nail dupe' tutorial, show application close-up.
Story poll: 'Classic red or bold red?' drive engagement immediately.
tactics.ugc_brief: Creators: film hands-only red nail GRWM tagging our shade as the Selena match.
tactics.asset_creation: Close-up hand shot: red nails, minimal jewelry, soft shadow, clean background.
tactics.seeding: Target nail art micro-creators with 10K-100K followers for same-day posting.
caption_hooks: Selena's nails but make it affordable.
The red nail that broke the internet is in your cart now.
Every villain era needs this exact red.

top_trends.what_is_it: Soft translucent watercolor nail art emerging as the dreamiest summer nail aesthetic.
top_trends.why_it_matters: Pinterest-to-TikTok pipeline is active; this trend has a 2-3 week runway still.
top_trends.content_angle: Tutorial showing watercolor nail effect using your products, dreamy pastel palette.

post_now: Reel: step-by-step watercolor nail tutorial, soft music, pastel tones.
Carousel: 6 watercolor nail color combos ranked for summer.
tactics.ugc_brief: Creators: film an ASMR-style watercolor nail tutorial featuring our polish lineup.
tactics.asset_creation: Dreamy soft-focus nail close-up, pastel wash background, floral props.
tactics.seeding: Brief beauty school creators and nail techs for organic tutorial content.
caption_hooks: Your nails but make them look like a painting.
Watercolor nails are summer's most underrated flex.
Soft, dreamy, effortless. Your nails this summer.

top_trends.what_is_it: Miami F1 Grand Prix became a fashion moment rivaling Coachella in style coverage.
top_trends.why_it_matters: Motorsport-chic is a proven recurring trend with aspirational, affluent audience alignment.
top_trends.content_angle: Position your product as the essential accessory for the paddock-to-party lifestyle.

post_now: Reel: 'Dress like you're in the VIP paddock' styling video featuring your product.
Carousel: 'Miami GP street style breakdown' with product integrated naturally.
tactics.ugc_brief: Creators: build a Grand Prix-inspired OOTD featuring our product as the statement piece.
tactics.asset_creation: Sleek editorial shoot: bold colors, racing-stripe graphic overlays, Miami palette.
tactics.seeding: Target fashion and F1 crossover creators who attended or covered Miami GP.
caption_hooks: Coachella had its moment. Miami GP has ours.
The paddock called. Your look is ready.
F1 fashion just hit differently this year.

top_trends.what_is_it: A $600 TikTok-viral perfume declared impossible to dupe is driving obsessive online debate.
top_trends.why_it_matters: Scarcity plus dupe culture tension creates massive engagement loop and purchase urgency.
top_trends.content_angle: Enter the debate: challenge or affirm the 'undupable' claim with your fragrance product.

post_now: Reel: 'We tried to dupe the $600 perfume. Here's what happened.' honest review format.
TikTok stitch or duet trending fragrance content with your product as the challenger.
tactics.ugc_brief: Creators: blind scent test video — can followers tell the difference? Use our fragrance.
tactics.asset_creation: Moody perfume flat lay: dark background, dramatic lighting, luxury feel on a budget.
tactics.seeding: Target FragranceTok creators with engaged communities around dupe reviews.
caption_hooks: The fragrance girlies are obsessed and we understand why.
You can't dupe it. Or can you?

hot_hashtags.how_to_use: Attach to any green product content immediately while Taylor Swift signal is hot.
Use on fragrance content to tap into highly engaged scent community on TikTok.
Pair with celebrity name references to ride Selena Gomez search traffic spike.
Attach to motorsport-chic styling content while Miami GP coverage is still trending.
Own this hashtag early before it peaks; post tutorial content in next 48 hours.

top_celebrity_moments: Taylor Swift's matcha green bag triggering mass dupe search frenzy nationwide.
Selena Gomez's red nail polish ID'd by Allure, driving immediate product searches.
hollywood_pulse.brand_tie_in_opportunity: Lead with celebrity-inspired 'get the look for less' content across beauty and accessories immediately.

weekly_content_calendar_suggestions.angle: Taylor Swift-inspired green accessory styling, lead with dupe energy and spring mood.
Recreate Selena's exact red nail, tutorial format, hands close-up, bold caption.
Enter the $600 perfume conversation with a blind test or honest challenger narrative.
Motorsport-chic editorial styling breakdown, position product as the statement piece.
Dreamy summer nail tutorial, ASMR pacing, soft palette, weekend appointment energy.
Repost community green, red nail, and fragrance content with voting and poll stickers.
Weekly trend recap, tease next week's drop or campaign to build anticipation.

creator_brief_of_the_week.concept: Film a 'celebrity inspired vs. our version' dual comparison across beauty and accessories.
creator_brief_of_the_week.target_creator_profile: Beauty or fashion micro-creator, 20K-150K followers, known for honest dupe reviews.
creator_brief_of_the_week.deliverable: One 30-60 second Reel or TikTok posted within 48 hours of briefing.
creator_brief_of_the_week.hook: I found the exact [celebrity] look for under $50 and I'm not sorry.
dos: Show product in natural light with honest close-up detail shots.
Reference the celebrity or trend by name in first 3 seconds.
donts: Don't make it feel scripted or overly produced.
Don't skip the price comparison — that's the hook.

emerging_to_watch: Devil Wears Prada BAFTA buzz suggesting a sequel or revival moment building.
Charli XCX rock music pivot opening alt-fashion and edge aesthetic content opportunities.
fading_trends: Quiet luxury minimalism losing ground to bold color and maximalist celebrity dressing.
trend_watch.predicted_next_week: Met Gala 'Costume Art' theme coverage will dominate beauty and fashion content next week.
